title: Language Change  - Tab when the internet is off
scenario: Language tab in Device Settings is greyed out with "Feature unavailable" dialog when internet is disconnected
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Ensure the device has no internet connection (e.g., enable Airplane Mode or turn off Wi-Fi and mobile data).
4. Tap on the connected Poly Bluetooth audio device to open Device Settings.
5. Locate the Language tab in Device Settings.
6. Observe that the Language tab appears greyed out.
7. Tap on the greyed-out Language tab.
8. Observe the dialog that appears: "Feature unavailable. An internet connection is required to access this feature." with an "Ok got it" button.
10. Observe that the dialog closes and the Language tab returns to its greyed-out state.
expected: When there is no internet connection, the Language tab in Device Settings should be greyed out. Tapping it should display a dialog: "Feature unavailable. An internet connection is required to access this feature." with an "Ok got it" button. Tapping the button should close the dialog and return to the greyed-out state.
